'''Lyndelah Jenwald''' was a a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as a [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was wounded during the [[Battle of Ylesia]].

{{Char-stub}}
